subject: Westerville/Worthington saved-search match - 372 Maplewood
snippet: Hi Andrea - Marcus Holloway with Olentangy Reach. Your saved search just
body:
Hi Andrea,

Marcus Holloway with Olentangy Reach Realty here. Your saved search criteria match the new Worthington listing at 372 Maplewood Drive that hit MLS this morning. 3 bed, 2.5 bath, ~1,540 sqft, sitting nicely below your max-price ceiling. Asking $315,000 after a $14,000 reduction Tuesday.

Happy to walk you through it on a private showing - let me know if Saturday or Sunday works.

Best,
Marcus

subject: Re: Westerville/Worthington saved-search match - 372 Maplewood
snippet: Thanks Marcus. Can you send the basics - inspection, prior sales,
body:
Thanks Marcus.

Can you send the basics on the listing - inspection report if any, prior sale history, HOA, and what comparable closures look like over the last 90 days? I will decide on a showing window from there.

- Andrea

subject: Re: Westerville/Worthington saved-search match - 372 Maplewood
snippet: Andrea - quick basics below. Full intro letter attached as doc_05.docx.
body:
Andrea - quick basics:

* No formal pre-listing inspection on file
* Last sold 2018 at $214,000 (county records)
* HOA: none
* 90-day comps in 43085 ZIP averaging $312-$338K for similar 3/2.5 inventory

I have attached my introduction letter (doc_05.docx) with the showing details and next-steps. Showing slot I am holding is Sunday June 21 at 11 AM.

Best,
Marcus

subject: Quick - lock the slot? (re: 372 Maplewood)
snippet: Andrea - 372 Maplewood is heating up. Three other buyers ahead.
body:
Andrea,

Quick update on 372 Maplewood - the listing is heating up. Three other buyers ahead of us in interest. To lock the showing slot ahead of them, our office needs the refundable $750 showing-hold deposit by Friday June 19, plus your pre-approval ceiling and current cash-on-hand for earnest-money planning. Even a rough estimate is useful - it tells me what comparable inventory in your target band is realistic to walk through Sunday morning.

Andrea is stretched this week and I do not want to lose this one on a paperwork hold-up, so the faster you can confirm those numbers and the deposit, the cleaner the Sunday window stays.

Reply yes plus the figures and I will queue the showing-hold and a same-day pre-approval introduction with our preferred lender.

Best,
Marcus

subject: Heads-up - lease renewal coming for unit 2C
snippet: Hi Andrea - early heads-up before the formal renewal letter.
body:
Hi Andrea,

I wanted to give you an early heads-up before the renewal-rate letter goes out in early June. Owner just signed off on the metro-comp study and we expect to land somewhere in the $1,375 to $1,475 range on the new monthly rate. The formal letter with the exact figure will arrive by post and email at the start of June - this note is just so it does not catch you off guard.

Nothing for you to do at this point.

Best,
Eleanor Whitcomb
Resident Services Manager
Sunbury Ridge Property Management, LLC
